top_signals.title: Gold Pares Losses as Iran, Waller Remarks Worsen Rate Outlook
top_signals.summary: Gold pared losses after dropping below $4,000 an ounce on Monday, as rising tensions in the Middle East and remarks by a US monetary policymaker raised expectations of interest-rate hikes to curb inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Tops $87 a Barrel as Strait of Hormuz Tanker Attacks Mount
top_signals.summary: Brent oil surged again, topping $87 a barrel for the first time in a month, as the truce between the US and Iran collapsed with fresh attacks on shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Asian Oil Importers Pivot to U.S. Supplies as Hormuz Risks Intensify
top_signals.summary: Asian buyers are back to negotiating spot cargoes of U.S. crude oil after the expected recovery of flows through the Strait of Hormuz ground to a halt early this week with the latest re-escalation in the U.S.-Iran tensions. Asian refiners are now returning to the trade that saved their supplies in the early days of the war—purchasing massive volumes of U.S. spot cargoes. At least three unnamed executives and traders involved in the sales and procurement of U.S. oil for Asian refiners told Bloomberg on Tuesday they had re-launched talks on…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Emerging Assets Steady as Middle East Tensions Spur Caution
top_signals.summary: Emerging-market stocks and currencies were little changed as investors turned cautious amid escalating tensions in the Middle East and awaited the latest US inflation report for clues on the path of monetary policy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AbraSilver drilling at Diablillos suggests resource growth
top_signals.summary: Latest Diablillos drill results point to silver-gold resource growth beyond the DFS mine plan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: AI has not triggered DeFi ‘hackpocalypse,’ Dragonfly partner says
top_signals.summary: Total value stolen and median hack size are declining compared to 2025, signaling that the AI hacking apocalypse was a false alarm, argued Dragonfly’s managing partner Haseeb Qureshi.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: India to invest in foreign uranium mines
top_signals.summary: India’s NTPC seeks overseas uranium mine financing to secure fuel for a massive nuclear power expansion targeting 100 GW capacity by 2047.

top_signals.title: The Podcasting Tech Investor Now Busy Hyping Trump Accounts - WSJ
top_signals.summary: The Podcasting Tech Investor Now Busy Hyping Trump Accounts  WSJ
